knowledge.title: Knowledge Base
knowledge.subtitle: Workspace-scoped doc store · hybrid retrieval (BM25 + vector + RRF) · tool-first writes

knowledge.tip1Body: fuses BM25 full-text and vector semantic retrieval via RRF · auto top-k.
knowledge.tip2Body: Agents call <s1>kb_search</s1> / <s2>kb_read_document</s2> to retrieve; agents with the right grant can also <s3>kb_create_document</s3> to capture conversation outputs.
knowledge.tip3Body: Mount <s>allhands.skills.kb_researcher</s> on an employee and ask it:<quote>“did I write about xxx in my notes?”</quote>
